notes: No transfers used. Captain Olise (9 raw -> 18 captained). The MD1 to MD2 captain swap from Lautaro to Olise was the largest single decision of the group stage; based on D. Guajardo's read on Olise form vs the model's preference for Lautaro retention. NOTE: user initially stated 102 points but the backtest against realised round_points showed 84. The 18-point gap may reflect a captain-doubling or auto-sub the user misremembered. We use 84 (realised) for the paper's accuracy tables.
